_notes: Source: AU Core Immunization (Australian realm). Target: US Core Immunization (US realm). Both mark status, vaccineCode, patient, occurrence[x], primarySource as MS. Key differences: AU Core uses AU-specific vaccine code slicing (AMT+AIR required sub-slices) with no overall vaccineCode binding; US Core replaces this with a single extensible CVX VS binding on vaccineCode and adds no sub-slices; US Core adds a root warning constraint (us-core-5), an explicit required status binding, and statusReason MS; AU Core adds note MS absent in US Core; patient references differ (au-core vs us-core).

drifts.description: New warning constraint us-core-5(warning) added in target: US Core adds a root-level warning constraint on Immunization; source AU Core has no root-level constraint.

status binding explicitly added in target: US Core adds required(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/immunization-status); source AU Core does not declare a binding on status in its differential (inherits R4 required binding). Binding explicitly tightened/re-declared in target differential.

statusReason MustSupport added on optional element in target: US Core adds statusReason[mustSupport=true]; source AU Core does not constrain statusReason at element level. MS added on optional element.

statusReason binding changed: source preferred(https://healthterminologies.gov.au/fhir/ValueSet/reason-vaccine-not-administered-3) [AU reason not administered VS] → target example(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/immunization-status-reason) [R4 base VS]. Binding strength weakened from preferred to example and AU-specific VS replaced.

vaccineCode.coding slicing removed in target: source AU Core defines pattern-type slicing on vaccineCode.coding with AU-specific named slices (amtVaccineCode, airVaccineCode); target US Core has no slicing on vaccineCode.coding.

vaccineCode.coding:amtVaccineCode slice removed in target: source has [max=1, mustSupport=true, required(https://healthterminologies.gov.au/fhir/ValueSet/amt-vaccine-1)]; target has no equivalent slice.

vaccineCode.coding:airVaccineCode slice removed in target: source has [max=1, mustSupport=true, required(https://healthterminologies.gov.au/fhir/ValueSet/australian-immunisation-register-vaccine-1)]; target has no equivalent slice.

vaccineCode overall binding added in target: US Core adds extensible(http://cts.nlm.nih.gov/fhir/ValueSet/2.16.840.1.113762.1.4.1010.6) [CVX vaccine codes]; source AU Core has no overall binding on vaccineCode (only AU-specific required bindings on sub-slices). New US realm binding replaces AU sub-slice required bindings.

patient reference target changed: source constrains to au-core-patient (http://hl7.org.au/fhir/core/StructureDefinition/au-core-patient) → target constrains to us-core-patient (http://hl7.org/fhir/us/core/StructureDefinition/us-core-patient). Different realm-specific patient profiles.
occurrence[x] type-level MS added in target: US Core adds mustSupport on the dateTime choice of occurrence[x]; source AU Core marks occurrence[x] as mustSupport but not at type level.
note MustSupport removed on optional element: source AU Core marks note[mustSupport=true]; target US Core does not constrain note in its differential. MS removed on optional element.
performer slicing removed in target: source AU Core defines pattern:function slicing on performer with named slices administeredBy and approvedBy; US Core Immunization has no performer slicing.

performer.function binding changed: source extensible(http://terminology.hl7.org.au/ValueSet/v2-0443-extended) [AU V2 extended VS] → target extensible(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/immunization-function) [R4 base VS]. Same binding strength, AU-extended VS replaced.
performer:administeredBy slice removed in target: source has [max=1, function min=1 max=1 with required pattern code AP, actor min=1 max=1]; US Core has no named performer slices.
performer:approvedBy slice removed in target: source has [max=1, function min=1 max=1 with required pattern code OP, actor min=1 max=1]; US Core has no named performer slices.

reasonCode binding changed: source preferred(https://healthterminologies.gov.au/fhir/ValueSet/reason-vaccine-administered-1) [AU reason administered VS] → target example(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/immunization-reason) [R4 base VS]. Binding strength weakened from preferred to example and AU-specific VS replaced.

site binding changed: source preferred(https://healthterminologies.gov.au/fhir/ValueSet/immunisation-anatomical-site-1) [AU anatomical site VS] → target example(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/immunization-site) [R4 base VS]. Binding strength weakened from preferred to example and AU-specific VS replaced.

route binding changed: source preferred(https://healthterminologies.gov.au/fhir/ValueSet/immunisation-route-of-administration-1) [AU route of administration VS] → target example(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/immunization-route) [R4 base VS]. Binding strength weakened from preferred to example and AU-specific VS replaced.

protocolApplied.targetDisease binding changed: source preferred(https://healthterminologies.gov.au/fhir/ValueSet/vaccination-target-disease-1) [AU vaccination target disease VS] → target example(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/immunization-target-disease) [R4 base VS]. Binding strength weakened from preferred to example and AU-specific VS replaced.
